creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
According to the Package Building Errors, this port has
	been broken for a while.

Fix: I have no idea whether anyone uses this port, especially given
	the existence of a tftpd in the base system.

	Also, development seems to have ceased (the distfile is dated
	in October 1995).

	Either nuke the port entirely, or apply the following diff
	to unbreak it.


cvs diff: Diffing .
cvs diff: Diffing files
cvs diff: Diffing patches
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd ftp/yale-tftpd; make
